Rui_ro_diem: R1 - Truy cap trai phep camera IP (20)
Bien_phap_cu_the: Doi toan bo mat khau mac dinh ngay khi lap dat; dat mat khau manh rieng cho tung thiet bi; tat truy cap camera truc tiep tu Internet, chi cho phep qua VPN/cloud relay co xac thuc.

Rui_ro_diem: R2 - Doan/be mat khau tai khoan admin (20)
Bien_phap_cu_the: Ap dung mat khau manh toi thieu 12 ky tu, bat xac thuc da yeu to (MFA) cho tai khoan quan tri router/gateway/dashboard; khoa tai khoan sau 5 lan dang nhap sai.

Rui_ro_diem: R3 - Router mo cong ra Internet (15)
Bien_phap_cu_the: Ra soat va dong toan bo port forwarding khong can thiet; thay bang ket noi qua VPN noi bo truong hoac dich vu cloud relay co xac thuc; bat tuong lua tren router.

Rui_ro_diem: R4 - Gia mao du lieu cam bien (12)
Bien_phap_cu_the: Them xac thuc thiet bi (device_id + token/HMAC) tai gateway Node-RED truoc khi chap nhan du lieu; ghi log cac request bi tu choi de theo doi.

Rui_ro_diem: R5 - Replay lenh mo khoa cua (10)
Bien_phap_cu_the: Bo sung timestamp/nonce cho moi lenh dieu khien khoa; server tu choi lenh trung hoac qua han; gioi han so lan thu mo khoa sai trong 1 phut.
